suppress.notes: Doesn't appear to be a real vulnerability, jackson maintainers discuss at https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/issues/3973 Revisit when suppression expires

file name: jackson-databind-2.18.8.jar GHSA-5jmj-h7xm-6q6v. Fixed upstream in 2.18.9/2.21.5/2.22.1/3.1.4, but none of those artifacts are published to Maven Central yet, so we cannot bump. Time-boxed suppression until the 2.18.9 patch release is available; remove this entry and bump jackson-bom to 2.18.9 once it resolves.
